LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu.label: Miraboreasu
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Childhood.title: Forbidden Beast
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Childhood.description: As a symbol of misfortune, Miraboreasu's birth, like other Elder Dragons, is shrouded in mist. Little is known about this beast that transcends the ecosystem, and its name has become a symbol of the battle of destiny. Miraboreasu feels extreme contempt for anything other than itself and does not recognize any existence.
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Adulthood.title: Omen of Ruin
LanguageData.LBD_Miraboreasu_Adulthood.description: Legend has it that the prosperous Kingdom of Schrade was destroyed by Miraboreasu in a single night. The once-glittering palace was put to the torch, and the old capital centered on the ancient castle became a barren land where no sign of life could be felt. Miraboreasu made the burnt Schrade Castle its nest, and this area was regarded as a forbidden zone that could not be set foot in...
LanguageData.LBD_BlackDragon_Trait.degreeDatas.黑龙.des: {PAWN_nameDef} is an ancient beast—though for some reason she fell from the ruins of Schrade to the rimworld and became like this. {PAWN_pronoun} is the incarnation of destruction, and only seeing the ants before her fall into a hell of fire will make {PAWN_pronoun} feel pleasure.
